pageContext.name: Fennec Shand 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: We are now releasing the second Chibi® Coin in a new Star Wars™ series celebrating The Book of Boba Fett™! Our newest addition features assassin and elite mercenary Fennec Shand™, as she appears in the recently released series.  In creating this unique collectible, the outer box has been designed to complement the coin inside, which is modeled after Fennec in her armor, as seen in the Lucasfilm series The Book of Boba Fett™. It also includes a large window to allow you to display your coin with ease. The coin itself is made from 1oz of pure silver which has been shaped and colored.   Only 2,000 coins will be minted. Each will feature a Certificate of Authenticity printed on the box along with confirmation of each coin's unique number in the mintage. Don't wait to add this coin to your collection!
